realm.name: ai-apis-user
realm.description: Standard access to AI API endpoints

realm.name: ai-apis-admin
realm.description: Admin access — required for privileged operations (add_lora, etc.)

clients.name: AI APIs service client
clients.description: Used by the Telegram bot and Nextcloud sync via Client Credentials flow

_comment_post_import: 1. Clients → ai-apis → Credentials → regenerate secret, update KEYCLOAK_CLIENT_SECRET in .env
2. Clients → ai-apis → Service account roles → verify 'ai-apis-user' is listed
(the users block above is sometimes ignored by Keycloak on import)
3. To give the bot admin access: add 'ai-apis-admin' to the service account roles
OR leave it out and keep ADMIN_API_KEY as the fallback for admin endpoints
